backend.description: NestJS/Prisma/GraphQL backend specialist for MediClick. Creates and modifies server modules following DDD pattern with domain/application/infrastructure/interfaces layers, Prisma schema and migrations, GraphQL resolvers, use-cases with execute(), and REST controllers with RBAC guards.

frontend.description: Next.js/MUI/Redux frontend specialist for MediClick. Creates views, components, Redux Toolkit slices, React Query hooks, MUI v5 components, Zod validation schemas, and role-based App Router pages.

feature-planner.description: Read-only agent that analyzes ROADMAP-citas.md and the existing codebase to plan feature implementation. Reviews what exists and generates detailed implementation plans with module boundaries, risks, dependencies, and ordering. Use ONLY when planning a new feature from the roadmap.

code-reviewer.description: Read-only agent that reviews code after every fix/feature. Verifies Clean Architecture layering, SOLID principles, test coverage, type safety, and the AUDITORIA's Convención de cierre por hueco. Use before committing any fix.
